title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Have you ever done any voluntary work? Tell me about it.
How important do you think it is to help people in your community?
What kinds of local projects would you like to see in your area?
Do you prefer to give your time or money to charity? Why?
How do you think communities can be made stronger?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think young people have a responsibility to help older members of their community?
What do you think is the greatest challenge facing communities today?
How can governments encourage more people to do voluntary work?
